products.title: Tam's Jams - Blueberry
products.description: Experience the sweet taste of authentic homemade blueberry jam. Made from real blueberries with no additives or artificial ingredients.
products.longDescription: Tam's Jams is a celebration of family, heritage, and the sweetness of second chances. Born from the heart of Tamara, an Armenian immigrant who came to America dreaming of becoming a Hollywood fashion designer. She traded fabric and thread for fruit and flavor, creating this beloved jam recipe that her grandson, now a filmmaker, encouraged her to share with the world.

brand.name: Tam's Jams
brand.story: Tam's Jams was born from the heart of Tamara, an Armenian immigrant who came to America dreaming of becoming a Hollywood fashion designer. Life had other plans — raising a large family came first — but her creativity never faded. She simply traded fabric and thread for fruit and flavor. Years later, her grandson, now a filmmaker, brought her to the red carpet of his blockbuster premiere — letting her live a piece of her dream. Inspired by her passion, he encouraged her to share her other love with the world. Tam's Jams is a celebration of family, heritage, and the sweetness of second chances.
